Hello, fellow Dot Shooters!

This update is a giant shootout: 

NEW: Touch Powers - Take Direct Control!
Idle Dot Shooter just got hands-on. Five new touch-activated superpowers let you blast dots yourself between idle runs:
- Swipe to Destroy - Drag your finger across the screen to slice through dots along the path. Active from Galaxy 1, no upgrades needed.
